title: leontodon biscutellifolius
intro: Leontodon biscutellifolius, also known as hawkbit or common hawkbit, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating skin conditions, wounds, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Leontodon biscutellifolius include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and aiding in the digestion of food. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a medical professional.
